2026-04-21T03:25:08.4914295Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4915154Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4915841Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4916423Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4916916Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4917579Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4917830Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-21T03:25:08.4918384Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4918757Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4919135Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4919572Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-21T03:25:08.4919964Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 issue(s) can be created.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"Detailed issue description in Markdown. Labels must exist in the repository.","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"parent":{"description":"Parent issue number for creating sub-issues. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 42 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/42). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123', 'aw_Test123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for referencing this issue before it's created. Use this when required tools or data are unavailable and the task cannot be meaningfully performed. This is distinct from noop (no action needed) — it indicates an active failure that prevented the task from running. When false, returns full GitHub API repository objects.","type":"boolean"},"order":{"description":"Sort order","enum":["asc","desc"],"type":"string"},"page":{"description":"Page number for pagination (min 1)","minimum":1,"type":"number"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"query":{"description":"Repository search query. Examples: 'machine learning in:name stars:\u003e1000 language:python', 'topic:react', 'user:facebook'. Supports advanced search syntax for precise filtering.","type":"string"},"sort":{"description":"Sort repositories by field, defaults to best match","enum":["stars","forks","help-wanted-issues","updated"],"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"},"name":"search_repositories"}]}}}

\\u003c198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\",\"author\":{\"name\":\"Jesse Squire\",\"email\":\"jesse.squire@gmail.com\",\"date\":\"2026-04-20T23:07:32Z\"},\"committer\":{\"name\":\"GitHub\",\"email\":\"noreply@github.com\",\"date\":\"2026-04-20T23:07:32Z\"}},\"author\":{\"login\":\"jsquire\",\"id\":913445,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/jsquire\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/913445?v=4\"},\"committer\":{\"login\":\"web-flow\",\"id\":19864447,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/web-flow\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19864447?v=4\"}},{\"sha\":\"[REDACTED]\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/commit/[REDACTED]\",\"commit\":{\"message\":\"Remove duplicate top-level `required` on credential definition (#58408)\\n\\nBoth Azure.Core and System.ClientModel ConfigurationSchema.json segments\\ndeclared `required: [\\\"CredentialSource\\\"]` at the top of\\n`definitions/credential`. When the appsettings schema combiner merges\\nsegments by definition name, it concatenates `required` arrays without\\ndedup, producing `[\\\"CredentialSource\\\", \\\"CredentialSource\\\"]` in the\\nconsumer's combined AppSettingsSchema.json. System.ClientModel already\\nrequires CredentialSource, so removing it from Azure.Core's top-level\\ncredential definition eliminates the duplicate while preserving all\\n`if`-clause requireds and the chainableCredential definition.\\n\\nCo-authored-by: Copilot \\u003c223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com\\u003e\",\"author\":{\"name\":\"m-nash\",\"email\":\"64171366+m-nash@users.noreply.github.com\",\"date\":\"2026-04-20T22:37:32Z\"},\"committer\":{\"name\":\"GitHub\",\"email\":\"noreply@github.com\",\"date\":\"2026-04-20T22:37:32Z\"}},\"author\":{\"login\":\"m-nash\",\"id\":64171366,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/m-nash\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64171366?v=4\"},\"committer\":{\"login\":\"web-flow\",\"id\":19864447,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/web-flow\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19864447?v=4\"}}]","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-04-21T03:28:59.0370498Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T03:26:25.940408434Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"owner":"Azure","path":"doc/GeneratorMigration/Library_Inventory.ps1","ref":"main","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"get_file_contents"}}}
2026-04-21T03:28:59.0415280Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-21T03:26:26.164612062Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"successfully downloaded text file (SHA: [REDACTED])","type":"text"},{"resource":{"mimeType":"text/plain; charset=utf-8","text":"# Azure SDK for .NET Libraries Inventory Generator\n#\n# This script generates an inventory of libraries in the Azure SDK for .NET repository,\n# categorizing them as data plane, management plane, or provisioning, and by the type of\n# generator used (Swagger or TypeSpec).\n#\n# Usage:\n#     powershell Library_Inventory.ps1 [-Json]\n#\n# Options:\n#     -Json    Generate a JSON file with the inventory data\n\n[CmdletBinding()]\nParam (\n    [switch]$Json\n)\n\n$EmitterMap = @{\n    'eng/azure-typespec-http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json' = '@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp'\n    'eng/azure-typespec-http-client-csharp-mgmt-emitter-package.json' = '@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-mgmt'\n    # NOTE: The provisioning emitter package json does not exist yet; it will be added when the provisioning generator PR merges.\n    'eng/azure-typespec-http-client-csharp-provisioning-emitter-package.json' = '@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-provisioning'\n    'eng/http-client-csharp-emitter-package.json' = '@typespec/http-client-csharp'\n}\n\nfunction Test-MgmtLibrary {\n    param([string]$Path)\n\n    # Check if a library is a management plane library\n    return ($Path -match \"Azure\\.ResourceManager\" -or $Path -match \"\\.Management\\.\")\n}\n\nfunction Test-ProvisioningLibrary {\n    param([string]$Path)\n\n    # Check if a library is a provisioning library\n    $libraryName = Split-Path $Path -Leaf\n    return ($libraryName -match \"^Azure\\.Provisioning\")\n}\n\nfunction Get-ProvisioningMgmtPeerLibrary {\n    param([string]$LibraryName)\n\n    # Map a provisioning library to its peer mgmt library.\n    # Azure.Provisioning (base) has multiple peer mgmt libraries.\n    # Azure.Provisioning.Deployment peers with Azure.ResourceManager + Resources.\n    # All others follow the pattern: Azure.Provisioning.X -\u003e Azure.ResourceManager.X\n\n    switch ($LibraryName) {\n        \"Azure.Provisioning\" {\n            return @(\"Azure.ResourceManager\", \"Azure.ResourceManager.Resources\", \"Azure.ResourceManager.Authorization\", \"Azure.ResourceManager.ManagedServiceIdentities\")\n        }\n        \"Azure.Provisioning.Deployment\" {\n            return @(\"Azure.ResourceManager\", \"Azure.ResourceManager.Resources\")\n        }\n        default {\n            $suffix = $LibraryName -replace \"^Azure\\.Provisioning\\.\", \"\"\n            return @(\"Azure.ResourceManager.$suffix\")\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nfunction Get-GeneratorType {\n    param([string]$Path)\n\n    # Identify if a library is generated using swagger or tsp.\n    # Returns: \"Swagger\", a specific TypeSpec generator name, \"TSP-Old\", \"Provisioning (Reflection)\", \"Provisioning (TypeSpec)\", or \"No Generator\"\n\n    # Discover tsp-location.yaml files once upfront to avoid redundant directory traversal\n    $tspLocationFiles = @()\n    if (Test-Path $Path) {\n        $tspLocationFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -Recurse -Filter \"tsp-location*\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n    }\n\n    # Special case for Provisioning libraries which use a custom reflection-based generator\n    # Check if the library has a tsp-location.yaml with the provisioning emitter first\n    if (Test-ProvisioningLibrary $Path) {\n        foreach ($tspLocationFile in $tspLocationFiles) {\n            try {\n                $content = Get-Content $tspLocationFile.FullName -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n                if ($content -and $content -match 'emitterPackageJsonPath:\\s*(?\u003cval\u003e\"[^\"]+\"|[^,\\s]+)\\s*,?') {\n                    $emitterPath = $matches['val'].Trim('\"')\n                    if ($EmitterMap.ContainsKey($emitterPath) -and $EmitterMap[$emitterPath] -eq '@azure-typespec/http-client-csharp-provisioning') {\n                        return \"Provisioning (TypeSpec)\"\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            catch {\n                # Continue\n            }\n        }\n        # Check if the library actually has a Generated folder (reflection-based provisioning uses it)\n        if (Test-Path (Join-Path $Path \"src\\Generated\")) {\n            return \"Provisioning (Reflection)\"\n        }\n        return \"Provisioning (No Generator)\"\n    }\n\n    # Special case for Azure.AI.OpenAI which uses TypeSpec with new generator via special handling\n    if ((Split-Path $Path -Leaf) -eq \"Azure.AI.OpenAI\" -and $Path -match \"openai\") {\n        return \"@typespec/http-client-csharp\"\n    }\n\n    # First check for direct TypeSpec indicators\n    $tspConfigPath = Join-Path $Path \"src\\tspconfig.yaml\"\n    $tspDir = Join-Path $Path \"src\\tsp\"\n    $tspFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $Path \"src\") -Filter \"*.tsp\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n\n    # Check for tsp-location.yaml files (reuse the list discovered earlier)\n    $tspLocationPaths = $tspLocationFiles | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }\n\n    # If there's a tsp-location.yaml file and it contains emitterPackageJsonPath, extract the generator name\n    foreach ($tspLocationPath in $tspLocationPaths) {\n        try\n        {\n            $content = Get-Content $tspLocationPath -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n            if ($content -and $content -match \"emitterPackageJsonPath\") {\n                # Extract the emitterPackageJsonPath value\n                if ($content -match 'emitterPackageJsonPath:\\s*(?\u003cval\u003e\"[^\"]+\"|[^,\\s]+)\\s*,?') {\n                    $emitterPath = $matches['val'].Trim('\"')\n\n                    if ($EmitterMap.ContainsKey($emitterPath))\n                    {\n                        return $EmitterMap[$emitterPath]\n                    }\n\n                    # If we didn't match the known emitters, return TSP-Old\n                    return \"TSP-Old\"\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                # Found tsp-location.yaml but no emitterPackageJsonPath, it's using the old TypeSpec generator\n                return \"TSP-Old\"\n            }\n        }\n        catch {\n            # Continue to next file if error\n        }\n    }\n\n    if ((Test-Path $tspConfigPath) -or (Test-Path $tspDir) -or $tspFiles) {\n        return \"TSP-Old\"\n    }\n\n    # Check autorest.md for generator information\n    $autorestMdPath = Join-Path $Path \"src\\autorest.md\"\n    if (Test-Path $autorestMdPath) {\n        # If autorest.md exists, assume it's a Swagger library\n        return \"Swagger\"\n    }\n\n    # No autorest.md but Generated folder exists, assume Swagger\n    if (Test-Path (Join-Path $Path \"src\\Generated\")) {\n        return \"Swagger\"\n    }\n\n    # If we couldn't identify a generator, it's \"No Generator\"\n    return \"No Generator\"\n}\n\nfunction Test-HasTspLocation {\n    param([string]$Path)\n\n    # Check if the library has a tsp-location.yaml file\n    $tspLocationFiles = Get-ChildItem -Path $Path -Recurse -Filter \"tsp-location*\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n    return ($tspLocationFiles.Count -gt 0)\n}\n\nfunction Get-SdkLibraries {\n    param([string]$SdkRoot)\n\n    # Scan all libraries in the sdk directory.\n\n    $libraries = @()\n\n    # Scan through all service directories\n    $serviceDirs = Get-ChildItem -Path $SdkRoot -Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n    $totalServices = [Math]::Max($serviceDirs.Count, 1)\n    $serviceIndex = 0\n    $lastReportedBucket = 0\n\n    Write-Host \"  Scan progress: 0% (0/$($totalServices) services)\"\n\n    foreach ($serviceDir in $serviceDirs) {\n        $serviceIndex++\n        $servicePercent = [Math]::Min([math]::Floor((($serviceIndex - 1) * 100) / $totalServices), 100)\n        $displayPercent = [Math]::Min([math]::Floor(($serviceIndex * 100) / $totalServices), 100)\n        $progressBucket = [Math]::Floor($displayPercent / 10)\n        if ($progressBucket -gt $lastReportedBucket) {\n            Write-Host \"  Scan progress: $displayPercent% ($serviceIndex/$($totalServices) services)\"\n            $lastReportedBucket = $progressBucket\n        }\n\n        Write-Progress -Id 1 -Activity \"Scanning SDK libraries\" -Status \"Service $serviceIndex/$($totalServices): $($serviceDir.Name)\" -PercentComplete $servicePercent\n\n        # Look for library directories\n        $libraryDirs = Get-ChildItem -Path $serviceDir.FullName -Directory -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\n        $totalLibrariesInService = [Math]::Max($libraryDirs.Count, 1)\n        $libraryIndex = 0\n\n        foreach ($libraryDir in $libraryDirs) {\n            $libraryIndex++\n            $libraryPercent = [Math]::Min([math]::Round(($libraryIndex / $totalLibrariesInService) * 100, 0), 100)\n            Write-Progress -Id 2 -ParentId 1 -Activity \"Scanning $($serviceDir.Name)\" -Status \"Library $libraryIndex/$($totalLibrariesInService): $($libraryDir.Name)\" -PercentComplete $libraryPercent\n\n            # Skip directories that don't look like libraries\n            if ($libraryDir.Name -in @(\"tests\", \"samples\", \"perf\", \"assets\", \"docs\")) {\n                continue\n            }\n\n            # Skip libraries that start with \"Microsoft.\" or don't start with \"Azure.\"\n            if ($libraryDir.Name.StartsWith(\"Microsoft.\") -or -not $libraryDir.Name.StartsWith(\"Azure.\")) {\n                continue\n            }\n\n            # Skip empty directories (e.g., leftover from deleted libraries) - must have at least one .csproj\n            $hasCsproj = Get-ChildItem -Path $libraryDir.FullName -Filter \"*.csproj\" -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\n            if (-not $hasCsproj) {\n                continue\n            }\n\n            if (Test-ProvisioningLibrary $libraryDir.FullName) {\n                $libraryType = \"Provisioning\"\n            }\n            elseif (Test-MgmtLibrary $libraryDir.FullName) {\n                $libraryType = \"Management\"\n            }\n            else {\n                $libraryType = \"Data Plane\"\n            }\n\n            $generator = Get-GeneratorType $libraryDir.FullName\n            $hasTspLocation = Test-HasTspLocation $libraryDir.FullName\n\n            # Calculate relative path from parent of SDK root (to include 'sdk' prefix)\n            $repoRoot = Split-Path $SdkRoot -Parent\n            $relativePath = $libraryDir.FullName.Substring($repoRoot.Length + 1)  # +1 to remove leading separator\n            $relativePath = $relativePath -replace \"\\\\\", \"/\"  # Normalize to forward slashes\n\n            $libraries += [PSCustomObject]@{\n                service = $serviceDir.Name\n                library = $libraryDir.Name\n                path = $relativePath\n                type = $libraryType\n                generator = $generator\n                hasTspLocation = $hasTspLocation\n                mgmtPeerLibrary = if ($libraryType -eq \"Provisioning\") { @(Get-ProvisioningMgmtPeerLibrary $libraryDir.Name) } else { @() }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Write-Progress -Id 2 -Activity \"Scanning SDK libraries\" -Completed\n    Write-Progress -Id 1 -Activity \"Scanning SDK libraries\" -Completed\n\n    return $libraries\n}\n\nfunction New-MarkdownReport {\n    param([array]$Libraries)\n\n    # Generate a markdown report from the library inventory.\n\n    # Define exclusion list for generator types that are not TypeSpec new emitters\n    $excludedGenerators = @(\"Swagger\", \"TSP-Old\", \"No Generator\", \"Provisioning (Reflection)\", \"Provisioning (TypeSpec)\", \"Provisioning (No Generator)\")\n\n    # Group by type and generator\n    $mgmtLibraries = $Libraries | Where-Object { $_.type -eq \"Management\" }\n    $dataPlaneNonProvisioning = $Libraries | Where-Object { $_.type -eq \"Data Plane\" }\n    $provisioningLibraries = $Libraries | Where-Object { $_.type -eq \"Provisioning\" }\n    $noGenerator = $Libraries | Where-Object { $_.generator -eq \"No Generator\" }\n\n    # Count libraries by generator type (excluding provisioning from data plane)\n    $mgmtSwagger = $mgmtLibraries | Where-Object { $_.generator -eq \"Swagger\" }\n    $mgmtNewEmitter = $mgmtLibraries | Where-Object { $_.generator -notin $excludedGenerators }\n    $mgmtTspOld = $mgmtLibraries | Where-Object { $_.generator -eq \"TSP-Old\" }\n\n    # For Data Plane, explicitly exclude provisioning libraries from all counts\n    $dataSwagger = $dataPlaneNonProvisioning | Where-Object { $_.generator -eq \"Swagger\" }\n    $dataNewEmitter = $dataPlaneNonProvisioning | Where-Object { $_.generator -notin $excludedGenerators }\n    $dataTspOld = $dataPlaneNonProvisioning | Where-Object { $_.generator -eq \"TSP-Old\" }\n\n    # Calculate TypeSpec library counts (only those with tsp-location.yaml or Azure.AI.OpenAI with special handling)\n    # Exclude provisioning libraries from data plane TypeSpec counts\n    $mgmtTypeSpecLibs = $mgmtLibraries | Where-Object { $_.hasTspLocation -eq $true }\n    $dataTypeSpecLibs = $dataPlaneNonProvisioning | Where-Object { $_.hasTspLocation -eq $true -or $_.library -eq \"Azure.AI.OpenAI\" }\n\n    # Calculate migration percentages (migrated / total TypeSpec libraries)\n    $mgmtMigrated = $mgmtNewEmitter.Count\n    $mgmtTypeSpecTotal = $mgmtTypeSpecLibs.Count\n    $mgmtPercentage = if ($mgmtTypeSpecTotal -gt 0) { [math]::Round(($mgmtMigrated / $mgmtTypeSpecTotal) * 100, 1) } else { 0 }\n\n    $dataMigrated = $dataNewEmitter.Count\n    $dataTypeSpecTotal = $dataTypeSpecLibs.Count\n    $dataPercentage = if ($dataTypeSpecTotal -gt 0) { [math]::Round(($dataMigrated / $dataTypeSpecTotal) * 100, 1) } else { 0 }\n\n    $report = @()\n    $timestamp = Get-Date -Format \"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss UTC\" -AsUTC\n    $report += \"# Azure SDK for .NET Libraries Inventory`n\"\n    $report += \"\u003e **Auto-generated** by ``Library_Inventory`` on $timestamp.\"\n    $report += \"\u003e Run that script to refresh this file.`n\"\n\n    # Table of Contents\n    $report += \"## Table of Contents`n\"\n    $report += \"- [Summary](#summary)\"\n    $report += \"- [Data Plane Libraries (DPG) - Migrated to New Emitter](#data-plane-libraries-dpg---migrated-to-new-emitter)\"\n    $report += \"- [Data Plane Libraries (DPG) - Still on Swagger](#data-plane-libraries-dpg---still-on-swagger)\"\n    $report += \"- [Management Plane Libraries (MPG) - Migrated to New Emitter](#management-plane-libraries-mpg---migrated-to-new-emitter)\"\n    $report += \"- [Management Plane Libraries (MPG) - Still on Swagger](#management-plane-libraries-mpg---still-on-swagger)\"\n    $report += \"- [Provisioning Libraries](#provisioning-libraries)\"\n    $report += \"- [Libraries with No Generator](#libraries-with-no-generator)\"\n
